_comment: EXAMPLE FILE — based on publicly available data from mybuxi.ch/emmental (accessed 2026-03-09) and the stop list PDF dated 2026-02-01. Provider IDs and legal entity details are illustrative. This file serves as a real-world stress test for the MSD-CH data model.

identified_gaps: FARE CONDITIONALITY: MSD v0.1.0 lacks a mechanism for conditional fare lists based on user group membership (Vereinsmitglied, Gemeindezugehörigkeit, Partner). The two-list system (grüne/rote Liste) requires a fare_group or fare_eligibility concept that scopes entire fare structures to user categories beyond simple discounts.
GROUP PRICING: The 'rote Liste' charges per trip for up to 6 persons (CHF 25-40). MSD has no concept of group fares where a single price covers multiple passengers.

SUBSCRIPTION PRODUCTS: Tageskarte, 10er-Karte, Monatsabo, Jahresabo (personal and transferable) are product types not modelled in MSD. The current fare_structures model covers single-trip pricing but not subscription/pass products.
PARTNER TARIFF: Trips to/from partner locations have a fixed reduced fare (CHF 5/10). This is a location-conditional fare not expressible in the current zone-crossing model.
STOP-BASED SERVICE AREA: mybuxi operates 335 named stops, not zone polygons. MSD service_area.type supports 'zones' but the stop-list model needs validation.

COMMUNITY FUNDING MODEL: The distinction between publicly co-funded municipalities (Affoltern, Heimiswil) and non-funded municipalities drives the entire fare structure. This is a governance/funding dimension not modelled in MSD.
HALBTAX/GA NON-ACCEPTANCE: mybuxi explicitly does NOT accept Swiss PT credentials. MSD needs a way to declare credential non-acceptance, not just acceptance.

provider.name: mybuxi Emmental
provider.description: On-demand community transport service in the Emmental region, operated by volunteers

legal_entity.name: mybuxi AG
legal_entity._comment: mybuxi AG is the parent company; day-to-day operations in Emmental are managed by Verein mybuxi Emmental

swiss_profile._comment: mybuxi Emmental is not concessioned (keine Konzession). Not subsidised by canton or federal government. Funded by fare revenue, municipal contributions (Affoltern, Heimiswil), and private partners.

operating_hours._comment: MSD v0.1.0 operating_hours.exceptions are date-keyed (Concept Paper §3.3); a recurring date-less holiday rule cannot be expressed and is carried here as a non-normative note. Logged as a v0.2.0 candidate (docs/v0.2.0-candidates.md §B.2).

service_area._stops_note: Representative sample of the 335-stop list (full list at stops_url, count at stops_count). Renamed from 'stops_sample' to satisfy the v0.1.0 requirement that service_area.type='stops' carry a 'stops' array (Concept Paper Appendix D.1). See docs/v0.2.0-candidates.md §C.
service_area._comment: Full stop list (335 stops) available at stops_url. Stops are grouped by municipality prefix (AF=Affoltern, BU=Burgdorf, DÜ=Dürrenroth, HA=Hasle, HE=Heimiswil, LÜ=Lützelflüh, OB=Oberburg, RÜ=Rüegsau, SU=Sumiswald, WY=Wynigen). Stops marked with * in the original list are partner or key stops.

vehicles.name: Electric Minibus
vehicles._comment: Exact fleet size not publicly documented. Capacity details are estimates based on vehicle type.

safety._comment: Safety features are estimates. mybuxi drivers are identified volunteers. Reporting via emmental@mybuxi.ch. No dedicated safety app features documented.

accessibility.animals_policy: Assistenzhunde mit Ausweis und Tiere in einem Korb sind gestattet
accessibility._comment: Accessibility details not fully documented on website

fare_structures.name: Grüne Liste — vergünstigter Tarif
fare_structures.description: Reduced fares for: residents of co-funding municipalities (Affoltern i.E., Heimiswil), members of Verein mybuxi Emmental or other mybuxi associations, and trips to/from partner locations

requires_any_of.description: Trip origin or destination is a partner stop

products.name: Jahresabo unpersönlich
products._comment: Holders of unpersönliches Jahresabo receive a free stop at their address

conditions.note: Gratis in Begleitung von Erwachsenen. Kinder bis 12 müssen von einer erwachsenen Person begleitet werden oder eine schriftliche Einverständniserklärung vorweisen.

discounts.name: Gruppentarif

conditions.note: Ab vier Personen: CHF 40.00 pro Fahrt und Bus

discounts._schema_gap: Group fares (flat price per vehicle regardless of zone) are not modelled in MSD v0.1.0

credential_acceptance._comment: Die Fahrkarten des öffentlichen Verkehrs gelten bei uns (noch) nicht.
credential_acceptance._schema_gap: MSD v0.1.0 models credential-based discounts but has no mechanism to explicitly declare non-acceptance of standard credentials

fare_structures.name: Rote Liste — Normaltarif
fare_structures.description: Standard fares for all other trips: non-member, non-partner, outside co-funding municipalities

eligibility._comment: This fare structure applies when none of the grüne Liste eligibility conditions are met

advance_booking._comment: Booking constraints not publicly documented on website. Bookable via app.

_booking_channels_detail._comment: MSD v0.1.0 models booking_channels as a code-list string array (Concept Paper §3.6). The richer per-channel detail below is retained as a non-normative extension and logged as a v0.2.0 candidate (docs/v0.2.0-candidates.md §B.1).

phone.description: For group bookings and special destinations

email.description: Fahrten mit Gruppen oder an Orte, die noch nicht erschlossen sind

multi_stop._comment: Multi-stop trips not documented as supported. Standard point-to-point service.

child_accompaniment_rules._comment: Kinder bis 12 Jahre müssen von einer erwachsenen Person begleitet werden oder eine schriftliche Einverständniserklärung der Erziehungsberechtigten vorweisen.

settlement.description: Cash in vehicle, prepaid via webshop/Schaukäserei, or invoice
settlement._comment: mybuxi is not integrated into any MaaS platform. Settlement is direct between passenger and operator.

routing_hints._comment: Values are estimates. mybuxi is a volunteer-operated service with variable detour factors depending on pooling.

reduced_fare._comment: Trips to/from partner at reduced rate

critical: Conditional fare eligibility (membership, residence, partner trip) — needs fare_group or fare_eligibility concept
Subscription products (day pass, multi-ride, monthly/annual pass, transferable vs personal) — needs subscriptions model
Group pricing (flat fare per vehicle up to N passengers) — needs group_fare concept
Credential non-acceptance declaration — needs negative credential mapping
important: Partner network with location-conditional fares — needs partners model or stop-level fare overrides
Holiday schedule rules (Sonntagsbetrieb an Feiertagen) — needs holiday_rule in operating_hours
Sales points / ticket distribution channels — needs sales_points model
Municipality-based zones (not geographic polygons) — zone definition needs administrative boundary support
Volunteer-operated service flag — provider metadata gap
minor: Overnight operating hours crossing midnight (05:25-00:00, 05:25-01:30) — time format needs 24h+ or next-day convention
Special request channel (email for groups, unserved destinations) — booking_rules extension
Stop acquisition model (Haltepunkt kaufen/erhalten) — outside MSD scope but notable
